title: SENIORS MENTAL HEALTH - 211info
text: DESCHUTES COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SENIORS MENTAL HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health consultations, evaluations, treatment, and case management for seniors in care facilities and referred from private medical practitioners. Enhanced care outreach services include intensive case management, counseling, and behavioral interventions. 2577 NE Courtney Drive Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Adults 65 and older and people under age 65 who are homebound due to a physical disability or persistent mental illness. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Some services available evenings and weekends by arrangement. Email (541) 322-7500 9 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 322-7500 ext 9 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and Medicare. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Deschutes County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Geriatric Counseling Mental Health Evaluation * Older Adults Psychiatric Case Management * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUNG ADULTS IN TRANSITION MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - ADULT BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CHILD AND ADOLESCENT BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - DESCHUTES COUNTY CRISIS LINE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
